equipmentModel.purpose: Reference for owned gear, product relationships, and operating defaults. This is not a warranty or serial-number record.

equipment.name: Honda HRN216VKA
maintenance: Sharpen blade before spring growth or whenever cut quality declines.
Keep tall fescue on the higher side.
Do not remove more than about one-third of the blade at once.
equipment.operatingNotes: Self-propelled walk-behind mower. Mulch clippings unless they are clumpy, diseased, or smothering the turf.

equipment.name: Scotts Elite Spreader
maintenance: Clean after fertilizer or herbicide use.
Record exact setting, product, rate, and result after each application.
equipment.operatingNotes: Primary tool for granular lawn products.

equipment.name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL Blower
equipment.operatingNotes: Battery blower for lawn cleanup, hard surfaces, leaves, and light debris.

equipment.name: Milwaukee M12 FUEL HATCHET 6-inch Pruning Saw
maintenance: Keep chain sharp and bar oil available.
equipment.operatingNotes: Small pruning saw for limbs and property cleanup.

equipment.name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL Power Head
equipment.operatingNotes: Parent unit for Milwaukee interchangeable outdoor attachments.

equipment.name: Milwaukee String Trimmer Attachment
equipment.operatingNotes: Connects to the Milwaukee M18 FUEL Power Head.

equipment.name: Milwaukee Articulating Hedge Trimmer Attachment
equipment.operatingNotes: Connects to the Milwaukee M18 FUEL Power Head.

equipment.name: Westinghouse WPX3400 Pressure Washer
equipment.operatingNotes: 3400 PSI / 2.6 GPM pressure washer for outdoor cleaning.

equipment.name: Ortho Dial N Spray Hose-End Sprayer
maintenance: Rinse after use and avoid mixing incompatible products.
equipment.operatingNotes: Used for hose-end / liquid application scenarios.

equipment.name: HDX 1-Gallon Pump Sprayer #1
maintenance: Keep dedicated to non-selective weed killer.
equipment.operatingNotes: Reserved for Roundup Weed & Grass Killer.

equipment.name: HDX 1-Gallon Pump Sprayer #2
maintenance: Keep dedicated to grass-safe lawn weed killer.

equipment.name: Rain gauge / catch-can test
equipment.operatingNotes: Use for sprinkler output testing and rain verification before changing irrigation habits.
